text: Represent each owner-approved monthly spending plan as a stable local record for one explicit Budget Period and ZAR currency. Evidence [direct]: the owner needs monthly category budgets over the accepted ZAR-only LEDGER boundary; the durable local form is the selected brainstorm approach. Actor/workflow trace: P1 through UC-BUDGET-001 and UC-BUDGET-002.
target: Each Budget Period has stable identity and at most one Active Budget Plan Revision; repeated reads of unchanged state return the same period, currency, revision, status, and exact planned total.
